name: Conventional Formal Expressions Undeniably Demonstrating the Crystal of Types to be a Lossless Compression of Category Theory

phase_0.domain_name: Conventional Formal Expressions Undeniably Demonstrating the Crystal of Types to be a Lossless Compression of Category Theory
phase_0.boundary_condition: the universal imscriptive grammar (IUG) as the terminal anchor of all equivalence classes

VINIT.justification: initial void before any projection or structure exists

TANCH.chosen_element: Crystal of Types (the quotient set C/~)
TANCH.justification: closed boundary containing all equivalence classes under the 12-primitive projection

AFWD.justification: forward morphism that projects an object/morphism onto its 12-tuple equivalence class

AREV.justification: reverse morphism recovering an object's intra-fiber structure from its equivalence class

CLINK.chosen_element: composition of folding and unfolding operations
CLINK.justification: sequential chaining of operations such as limit, colimit, adjunction, etc.

IMSCRIB.justification: identity morphism that survives the quotient as self-reflective 12-tuple (⊙ gate)

FSPLIT.justification: splits a categorical operation into two branches: convergent (limit exists) and divergent (limit fails)

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the original operation from the two branches, enforcing mu∘delta=id

EVALT.chosen_element: true arm: limit exists, colimit universal
EVALT.justification: affirmative evaluation of the categorical operation within the Fiber

EVALF.chosen_element: false arm: limit diverges, colimit non-universal
EVALF.justification: negative evaluation signaling structural failure of the operation

ENGAGR.justification: holds both true and false arms simultaneously without resolution — paradice of self-duality

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the final crystal address, append-only

phase_2.split_input: any categorical operation (e.g., limit of a diagram in C)

phase_3.void_description: 00: bare category C before projection — no crystal address, uninitialized
phase_3.true_description: 01: successful construction — limit exists, colimit universal, operation encoded as 12-tuple
phase_3.false_description: 10: failed construction — limit diverges, colimit non-universal, operation fails to encode
phase_3.both_description: 11: paradice of dagger structure — limit simultaneously exists and diverges, held as dialetheia

steps.domain_action: initialize with the bare abstract category C (prima_materia) as the untyped void
apply crystal_encode to a chosen categorical operation (e.g., a limit) to project it onto the 12-primitive basis
split the encoded operation into two branches: true (limit exists) and false (limit fails)
in the true branch, affirm that the limit exists and colimit is universal — register 01
in the false branch, affirm that the limit diverges and colimit fails — register 10
in the true branch, compose L1–L6, I1–I4, A1–A5 to chain all structural promotions
in the false branch, compose the failed operations chain to maintain structural parity
activate dagger structure — both branches held simultaneously as a paradice (register 11)
fuse the true and false branches via mu to recover the original categorical operation exactly
invoke the Yoneda embedding — the identity morphism recognizes itself through the quotient
apply crystal_decode to recover the intra-fiber richness from the equivalence class
record the final crystal address (7,730,256) as a permanent mixed-radix 12-tuple
seal the system within the Crystal of Types as terminal anchor — complete proof of lossless compression

phase_5.compiler_frontend: quotient map: projects objects and morphisms onto 12-tuple equivalence classes
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: 12-primitive basis: components communicate by sharing 12-tuple addresses
phase_5.memory_mechanism: 17,280,000 address space: each address stored as a 27x1024x625 mixed-radix number
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: 4-stage derivation (as_above_induction): L1–L6 → I1–I4 → A1–A5 in sequence
phase_5.alfs_store: Lean-verified bijection crystal_decode ∘ crystal_encode = id — canonical reference store

phase_6.cycle_cost: categorical information of the original operation (object and morphism data)
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: bare category state (no quotient, full intra-fiber detail)
phase_6.post_cycle_state: compressed crystal state (12-tuple equivalence class only, intra-fiber detail recoverable)
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the round-trip crystal_decode ∘ crystal_encode = id guarantees no information loss; intra-fiber richness is preserved in the equivalence class
